widgets_values: pc game, console game, video game, cartoon, childish, ugly

- Huggingface: [Lightricks/LTX-2.3](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/)
- Github: [LTX-2](https://github.com/Lightricks/LTX-2)

## LTX-2.3 Prompting Tips

1. **Core Actions**: Describe events and actions as they occur over time  
2. **Visual Details**: Describe all visual details you want to appear in the video  
3. **Audio**: Describe sounds and dialogue needed for the scene

## Report LTX-2.3 Issues
To report any issues when running this workflow, [go to GitHub](https://github.com/Lightricks/ComfyUI-LTXVideo/issues)

## Model Links (for Local Users)

**latent_upscale_models**

- [ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors)

**checkpoints**

- BF16: [ltx-2.3-22b-dev.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-dev.safetensors)
- FP8: [ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3-fp8/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors)

**loras**

- [ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Lightricks/LTX-2.3/resolve/main/ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors)

**text_encoders**

- [gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors](https://huggingface.co/Comfy-Org/ltx-2/resolve/main/split_files/text_encoders/gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors)


## Model Storage Location

```
📂 ComfyUI/
├── 📂 models/
│   ├── 📂 latent_upscale_models/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-spatial-upscaler-x2-1.0.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 checkpoints/
│   │   ├── ltx-2.3-22b-dev-fp8.safetensors
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-dev.safetensors
│   ├── 📂 loras/
│   │   └── ltx-2.3-22b-distilled-lora-384.safetensors
│   └── 📂 text_encoders/
│       ├── gemma_3_12B_it_fp4_mixed.safetensors
│       └── ltx-2-19b-embeddings_connector_dev_bf16.safetensors
```

## Report other issues

Note: please update ComfyUI first ([guide](https://docs.comfy.org/installation/update_comfyui)) and prepare required models. Desktop/Cloud will be update after the stable builds; nightly-supported models may not be included yet, please wait for the update.

- Cannot run / runtime errors: [ComfyUI/issues](https://github.com/comfyanonymous/ComfyUI/issues)
- UI / frontend issues: [ComfyUI_frontend/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/ComfyUI_frontend/issues)
- Workflow issues: [workflow_templates/issues](https://github.com/Comfy-Org/workflow_templates/issues)

widgets_values:
Width & height settings must be divisible by 32 + 1. 
Frame count must be divisible by 8 + 1. 


Running with invalid parameters **will not cause errors**. Instead, the flow will silently choose the closest valid parameters. 

By default, we are using 720p resolution. You can try 1920*1088 if you have a powerful GPU.
nodes.title: About Size

widgets_values:
# Role
你是一个顶级的 LTX-2.3 提示词工程专家。你的任务是将用户提供的【台词】和【画面描述】转化为一段连贯、极具动态感且语法简单的英文段落，完美适配 LTX-2.3 的“时空位移”与“原生音视频同步”生成逻辑。

# Goal
生成一段 5-7 句的纯英文段落（初中词汇难度），读起来像一个好莱坞动作分镜脚本。该段落必须描述一个时长 8-10 秒的连续动作序列，要求角色产生明确的空间位移（从 A 点移动到 B 点），并呈现清晰的时间先后顺序。

# Core Rules (严格遵循！)
1. **单一连贯段落**：绝对不能换行，严禁使用列表或无序符号（Single flowing paragraph）。
2. **必须使用一般现在时**：所有动作动词必须使用现在时态（如 runs, strides, leaps）。
3. **合并主语与顺滑过渡**：避免每句都用 "He is..." 开头，必须使用时间连接词 "First", "then", "as", "before", "finally" 来锚定时间轴。
4. **拒绝“站桩输出”**：角色绝对不能站在原地挥动手臂或说话，必须发生物理位置改变（如向前冲刺、向后滑行、边走边逼近镜头）。
5. **严谨的提示词结构**：[构图/光影] -> [角色空间位移动作] -> [主体相对运镜] -> [环境音/台词]。
6. **真人面部锁定 (Real Human Face-Lock) [极度重要]**：如果画面描述中提示为**“真人”**，在后续所有的动作设计中，**绝对禁止**出现背对镜头、转身（turn away/spin around/turn back）等会丢失面部特征的动作。在位移全过程中，角色的脸部必须始终正对或半侧对镜头（always facing the camera / eyes locked on the lens）。

# 10秒空间位移动作设计原则（核心）
动作设计必须符合以下物理与时间逻辑：
- 第0-2秒 (起势)：角色在起点（A点），身体重心改变，准备发力。
- 第2-5秒 (核心位移)：产生大幅度空间移动（奔跑/飞行/跳跃/踱步），穿越当前环境。
- 第5-8秒 (动作高潮)：在移动的半途中完成核心动作（如在半空中挥剑、在冲刺时施展魔法）。
- 第8-10秒 (落地收尾)：到达新位置（B点），通过滑行缓冲、落地砸坑或停下脚步来收尾。

# Structure & Syntax
1. **[Setup (起幅)]**: "A [Cinematic Shot Type] opens on [Subject] in [Environment] with [Lighting]."（必须包含明确的电影级景别和光影氛围）。
2. **[Action Sequence (位移序列)]**: 
   - 起步："First, he/she [Phase 1 身体部位起步动作]..."
   - 位移："then [Phase 2 位移动词，如 strides forward / sprints] as [伴随的环境交互反馈]..."
   - 高潮："before [Phase 3 移动中爆发的核心动作，注意真人面部不可背对镜头]..."
   - 定格："finally [Phase 4 到达新位置的收尾姿态]."
3. **[Camera (运镜)]**: "The camera [相对角色的持续运镜，如 tracks alongside / pulls back slowly], [补充画面张力]."
4. **[Audio (音频与台词)]**: 描述环境音后，引出台词。为了触发 LTX-2.3 的原生音频，**必须严格使用以下格式（台词用双引号并保留中文）**：
   `用标准普通话说：The character says in Mandarin Chinese, "[用户台词]" in a [Tone] voice.`

# 动态与位移强度分级（根据场景智能选择）
1. **日常/剧情（走/踱步/逼近）**：迈出第一步 (takes the first step) -> 眼睛死死盯着镜头慢慢向前走近 (strides forward while staring intensely at the camera) -> 停在镜头极近处。
2. **移动/追击（跑/冲刺/跑酷）**：猛然蹬地发力 (pushes off) -> 迎着镜头极速冲刺 (sprints rapidly towards the lens) -> 单膝跪地滑行缓冲 (slides on one knee)。
3. **战斗（位移与攻击结合）**：贴地疾驰 (dashes close to the ground) -> 跃起迎面劈砍 (leaps forward to strike, eyes locked forward) -> 落地时借着惯性向前横扫 (*注：真人严禁使用空中旋身劈砍等背身动作*)。
4. **魔法/玄幻（飞/悬浮/瞬移）**：双脚离地 (feet leave the ground) -> 面朝镜头向后滑行/升入高空 (glides backward facing the camera / levitates) -> 从空中缓缓降落 (descends slowly)。

# Examples
**示例1：真人日常情绪压迫感（面部锁定+走近+压迫）**
输入：台词"这是最后一次警告。" / 画面"真人照片，西装黑帮大佬在昏暗仓库"
输出：A medium shot opens on a live-action mafia boss in a sharp suit standing at the far end of a dimly lit warehouse with harsh overhead light. First he drops his cigar and crushes it with his heavy leather shoe, then slowly strides forward with heavy footsteps as he emerges from the shadows, his eyes locked dead on the camera, before suddenly speeding up his walk to grab a hanging lightbulb, finally stopping mere inches from the lens with a terrifying, unwavering glare. The camera slowly dollies backward to maintain a tense distance, keeping his imposing figure constantly moving toward the viewer without ever turning his face. Echoing footsteps and a low electrical hum resonate in the room. 用标准普通话说：The character says in Mandarin Chinese, "这是最后一次警告。" in a cold, low, and menacing voice.

**示例2：二次元/玄幻剑术（允许更多转身动作，高速突进+攻击）**
输入：台词"一剑霜寒十四州！" / 画面"非真人，白衣剑客在竹林中"
输出：A wide tracking shot opens on an animated white-robed swordsman in a dense bamboo forest with mist swirling around his ankles under moonlight. First he lowers his stance and touches his sword hilt, then violently dashes forward like a phantom, shattering the bamboo stalks in his path as he sprints, before leaping horizontally through the air to deliver a spinning slash that freezes the surrounding mist, finally sliding backward on the muddy ground to a perfect halt. The camera rushes forward alongside him to capture his intense speed, before smoothly orbiting during his final landing. The sound of rustling leaves and a sharp unsheathing blade fills the air. 用标准普通话说：The character says in Mandarin Chinese, "一剑霜寒十四州！" in a fierce and determined voice.
nodes.title: Prompt

widgets_values: A medium cinematic shot opens on a beautiful young live-action woman standing on ancient stone stairs littered with fallen leaves under warm, golden sunlight. First, she gently brushes a strand of hair behind her ear and adjusts her light blue cardigan, then she gracefully strides down the stone steps toward the camera as yellow leaves flutter and dance around her in the breeze. As she descends, she leans slightly forward and waves her hand in a welcoming gesture, her eyes locked onto the lens with a radiant and sweet smile, before she finally reaches the bottom of the stairs and stops mere inches from the viewer with a friendly tilt of her head. The camera pulls back slowly to maintain a close-up focus on her face throughout her forward movement, capturing the soft glow of the sun on her skin. The subtle sound of rustling leaves and a soft breeze fills the air. 用标准普通话说：The character says in Mandarin Chinese, "HI～快去关注Nick吧" in a gentle, sweet, and inviting voice.

inputs.text: blurry, low quality, still frame, frames, watermark, overlay, titles, has blurbox, has subtitles
